screening.selection_rule: Using deployment-visible public features and the frozen public probe panel only, select the first four seed/severity cases whose effective fast Harness view retrieves level_shift_contrast_candidate.
screening.insufficient_support_rule: If fewer than four eligible cases are found in the frozen pool, stop as INCONCLUSIVE_APPLICABILITY_SUPPORT and do not expand or reorder the pool.

paired_evaluation.target_cases: the four outcome-blind selected level-shift cases
paired_evaluation.risk_and_scope_cases: every other generated target and risk case belonging to the selected seeds
paired_evaluation.comparison: domain-naive H0 versus the exact promoted snapshot, sharing one effective-request cache

interpretation_limits: Success demonstrates conditional reuse on new seeds and severities matching the learned observable scope; it is not a population-wide accuracy claim.
Failure must be classified as applicability support, behavior transfer, value transfer, risk, scope, or infrastructure failure; thresholds cannot be changed afterward.
The held-out run cannot edit or further evolve the Harness.
